Niseko, Hokkaido · Research Prototype

A Ride to
Mt. Yotei

You are about to cycle through rural Niseko towards the Mt. Yotei Observation Deck. Along the way, unexpected things may happen.

騎行前往羊蹄山觀景台。途中，意想不到的事情也許會發生。
